title: FirItemZoom
description: Tired of squinting at tiny item icons in your inventory or crafting table? FirItemZoom  is the perfect solution for detail-oriented crafters and builders.
body:
FirItemZoom is a sleek, client-side utility mod that adds a single, highly focused feature to your inventory screen: a large, rotating preview of the item under your mouse cursor.
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c9bb6083f21398aacbd1a628d95e1dd8b30d054_0.webp)
[Here is a preview video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EgkE37H45_NI48yRgKseKTiXrGFbhqJq/view?usp=sharing)
